articles.title: Boston police officer arrested, charged with manslaughter in fatal shooting
articles.description:
Nicholas O'Malley was arrested Thursday morning in connection with the March 11 shooting death of Stephenson King.

The post Boston police officer arrested, charged with manslaughter in fatal shooting appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston police officer Nicholas O'Malley was arrested for manslaughter on March 19, 2026.
O'Malley's charges stem from the shooting death of Stephenson King on March 11.
This incident raises concerns about police accountability and community safety in Boston.

articles.title: Police fatally shoot person with knife at Weymouth park, DA says
articles.description:
Officers responded to a 911 call at Webb Memorial State Park, where the victim was reportedly “in distress” and armed with a knife.

The post Police fatally shoot person with knife at Weymouth park, DA says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police fatally shot a person armed with a knife at Webb Memorial State Park.
Officers responded to a 911 call regarding a distressed individual on March 19.
The incident raises concerns about public safety and police response in Weymouth.

articles.title: A botanical garden in New England just ranked among the best in America
articles.description:
It opens for the season on May 1.

The post A botanical garden in New England just ranked among the best in America appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A New England botanical garden ranked among America's best, enhancing local tourism.
The garden opens for the season on May 1, attracting visitors to Boston.
Residents can enjoy increased recreational opportunities and community events this spring.

articles.title: With Opening Day a week away, it’s surprisingly easy to be excited about these Red Sox
articles.description:
Fans will watch a team that can pitch well, field much better than they did a year ago, and hit plenty — and the result should be a team that plays a crisp, fun style.

The post With Opening Day a week away, it’s surprisingly easy to be excited about these Red Sox appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox show improved pitching and fielding ahead of Opening Day on March 30.
Fans can expect a more exciting and competitive team compared to last season.
Enhanced performance may boost local attendance and community engagement this season.
